name: Tablet and Laptop Puffer Sleeve - heyday™ with Sharone Townsend
description:
Keep your device protected with the Tablet and Laptop Sleeve from heyday™, designed in collaboration with Sharone Townsend. Compatible with the Apple iPad Pro 12.9-inch (3rd generation, 2018) or tablets up to 13 inches, this sleeve is crafted from lightweight fabric and showcases a quirky and playful art prints. The soft-cushioned design ensures your device stays protected on the go, while the double-zipped closure provides easy and quick access. Carry your tablet in style with this catchy sleeve that's designed with your convenience in mind.

About the artist: Sharone is an imaginative, freelance illustrator and designer focused on apparel & Net art. He is from Oxon Hill, MD. Sharone loves to include abstract pieces, inventive pieces, fashion and digital textile in his illustrations. He also has an untold passion for aquascaping.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
